text: The system shall use a graphical user interface to display data to the user.
The system shall be used fully with a keyboard.
The system shall be used fully with a mouse.
The system shall support multiple games.
The system shall load additional games from an external source.
The system shall support multiple opening positions that can be applied to all games.
The system shall support two-player turn-based gaming.
The system shall provide a default artificial intelligence that plays using random moves.
The system shall provide an embedded AI that takes over from a player when requested.
The system shall load artificial intelligence implementations from external files.
The system shall prompt the user regarding the implementation of new AIs.
The system shall support the definition of new games without modifying the source code.
The system shall search an external source for games on startup and load them automatically.
The system shall terminate a game based on a pre-defined condition.
The system shall save the current state of a game to a file.
The system shall load a previously saved game from a file.
The system shall provide an embedded help file containing solutions and hints.
The system shall save all defined opening positions to ensure availability after a restart.
The system shall support solitaire games.
The user interface shall use one main window for game playing.
The system shall require the Java Runtime Environment version 1.4 or later.
The system shall utilize the Java Swing library for the graphical user interface.
The artificial intelligence shall calculate the next move within 10 seconds.
The system shall prompt the user for confirmation before overwriting an existing file.
The system shall run on both Linux and Windows operating systems.
